Interface IdentificationRegistry

All Known Implementing Classes:
PostOffice
public interface IdentificationRegistry
Interface for managing package pickup registrations in the Amazingco system. This registry allows checking if a package pickup has been registered, retrieving details of registered pickups, and registering new certified pickups. It ensures that only valid and authorized pickups are recorded, maintaining the integrity of the pickup records.

  • Method Summary

    Method
    Description
    Package
    getPackageRegistered(String packageCode)
    Returns the registered package for the given code.

    Returns the identifier (e.g.

  • Method Details

    • isPackagePickupRegistered

      boolean isPackagePickupRegistered(String packageCode)
      Check whether a pickup for the given package code has been registered.
      Parameters:
      packageCode - package identifier
      Returns:
      true when a pickup record for packageCode exists, false otherwise

    • getPackageRegistered

      Package getPackageRegistered(String packageCode)
      Returns the registered package for the given code.
      Parameters:
      packageCode - package identifier; requires isPackageRegistered(packageCode)
      Returns:
      non-null registered Package
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - or AssertionError when !isPackageRegistered(packageCode)

    • getRegisteredIdFor

      String getRegisteredIdFor(String packageCode)
      Returns the identifier (e.g. ID number) of the person who picked up the package.
      Parameters:
      packageCode - package identifier; requires isPackageRegistered(packageCode)
      Returns:
      a valid ID (non-null)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - or AssertionError when !isPackageRegistered(packageCode)

    • getPickupDateFor

      LocalDate getPickupDateFor(String packageCode)
      Returns the pickup date for the given package code.
      Parameters:
      packageCode - package identifier; requires isPackageRegistered(packageCode)
      Returns:
      non-null pickup LocalDate
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - or AssertionError when !isPackageRegistered(packageCode)

    • registerCertifiedPackagePickup

      void registerCertifiedPackagePickup(Package p, String id, LocalDate pickupDate)
      Register the certified pickup of a package.
      Parameters:
      p - package to register; requires p != null, that it is not already registered and that p.isCertified() is true
      id - identifier of the person picking up; must be authorized in the package
      pickupDate - date of pickup; requires pickupDate != null and that it is not after the allowed pickup expiration
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - or AssertionError when preconditions are violated
